game_info.title: Gem Defense - Tower Defense Game
game_info.concept:
An epic, challenging tower defense game with an emphasis on strategy and replayability. Summon gems of immense magical potency and harness their unique abilities against a seemingly endless horde of monsters. The archdemon seeks to swallow the world, and you must journey to stand against her. The cult classic tower defense game beloved by millions comes to Steam with GemCraft - Chasing Shadows. Against swarms of vicious, demonic avatars, your only defenses are the gems you conjure that, when placed atop towers or into traps and amplifiers, become conduits for powerful magical and elemental attacks. GemCraft combines fast-paced real-time strategy as you deal with waves of incoming monsters, and cunning tactics that allow you to craft and combine magical gems.

Create traps that poison or slow, discover powerful artifacts and unlock new abilities, and stand alone against The Forgotten, a seemingly unkillable archdemon whose endless armies threaten to swallow the world. GemCraft is packed with multiple levels of difficulty, hundreds of achievements, nearly two hundred levels, and much, much more, making it a rewarding, deep strategy game you'll come back to over and over again.

Key Features:


  • Conquer over 190 stages with unique challenges and conditions.
  • Over two dozen passive skills to unlock and enhance as you level up and increase your power.
  • More than 400 achievements that will reward you with more skill points as you earn them.
  • Craft and combine nine gem types with different effects to suit your tactical needs.
  • Combine and stack multiple tiers of difficulty and challenging battle traits for greater rewards, but also greater dangers.
  • Socket fragments you find into your mystical talisman to impart new bonuses.
  • Wield devastating spells to decimate your foes or enhance your gems.
  • Control the speed of battle with fast-forward or pause to fit your play style.
  • Want more monsters? Summon them with wave stones, but beware their greater power...
  • Replay any stage you've completed for more experience points or with a new challenge.
  • Hold out as long as you can after you win levels in Endurance mode for more rewards.
game_info.description: Defend your realm against endless waves of demonic monsters in this strategic tower defense game! Place magical gems on towers to attack enemies along their path. Combine gems to create more powerful versions, and strategically upgrade your defenses. Survive all waves to claim victory, or watch as the monsters breach your final defense and doom the realm!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate gem selection menu
Space: Select/place gem on tower or combine gems
Shift: Upgrade selected tower
Z: Sell selected tower
1-3 Keys: Quick-select gem types (1=Ruby, 2=Sapphire, 3=Emerald)
Enter: Start game / Send next wave early
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic tower placement and gem creation mechanics. Verify that towers can be built, gems can be placed, and basic attacking functionality works against the first few waves of monsters.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Build 2-3 towers along the path near the entrance. Place Ruby gems (damage-focused) on these towers. Let the first 3 waves attack to test if towers successfully target and damage monsters.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Towers should successfully attack monsters, dealing damage and eliminating them before they reach the end. The test is successful if the first 3 waves are cleared without any monsters reaching the goal.

TEST_2.test_description: Test gem combination and upgrade mechanics. Verify that gems can be combined to create higher tier gems with increased power, and that this mechanic provides strategic advantage.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Build 3 towers. Place basic gems on 2 towers, then combine them onto the third tower to create a tier-2 gem. Observe the increased damage output against waves 1-5.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Combined gems should show visibly higher damage numbers and clear monsters faster than basic gems. Success is measured by completing 5 waves with combined gems performing noticeably better than basic gems.
TEST_2.description: Test gem combination and upgrade mechanics. Verify that gems can be combined to create higher tier gems with increased power, and that this mechanic provides strategic advantage.

TEST_2.expected: Combined gems should show visibly higher damage numbers and clear monsters faster than basic gems. Success is measured by completing 5 waves with combined gems performing noticeably better than basic gems.

TEST_3.test_description: Test the full win condition by surviving all waves with optimal strategy. This validates that the game is winnable and that strategic tower placement and gem management leads to victory.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Build towers at strategic choke points along the path. Create high-tier gems through combination. Balance between Ruby (damage), Sapphire (slow), and Emerald (multi-target) gems. Upgrade towers when resources permit. Send waves early for bonus mana.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully defend against all 10 waves without letting any monsters reach the goal. The test succeeds when the victory screen appears with the message "YOU WIN!" and all waves have been cleared.
TEST_3.description: Test the full win condition by surviving all waves with optimal strategy. This validates that the game is winnable and that strategic tower placement and gem management leads to victory.

TEST_4.test_description: Test lose condition and resource management. Verify that poor strategy or lack of tower placement results in monsters reaching the goal and triggering game over.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Build no towers and let the first wave proceed unhindered to the goal. This tests the lose condition trigger and ensures game over state is properly handled.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Monsters should reach the goal, trigger lives loss, and when lives reach zero, game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Success is seeing the game over screen with appropriate messaging.
TEST_4.description: Test lose condition and resource management. Verify that poor strategy or lack of tower placement results in monsters reaching the goal and triggering game over.

TEST_5.test_description: Test different gem types and their special effects. Verify that Sapphire gems slow monsters, Ruby gems deal high damage, and Emerald gems can hit multiple targets.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Build 3 separate towers, each with a different gem type (Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald). Observe monster behavior and damage patterns through waves 1-3 to confirm each gem type has unique effects.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Sapphire gems should visibly slow monsters (reduced movement speed), Ruby gems should show higher damage numbers, and Emerald gems should show damage lines to multiple monsters simultaneously.
TEST_5.description: Test different gem types and their special effects. Verify that Sapphire gems slow monsters, Ruby gems deal high damage, and Emerald gems can hit multiple targets.

TEST_6.test_description: Test wave progression and difficulty scaling. Verify that later waves have more monsters with higher health, creating increasing challenge.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Build 2-3 basic towers and observe the progression from wave 1 through wave 6. Note the increasing number of monsters, their health values, and the escalating challenge.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Each subsequent wave should spawn more monsters with higher health values. By wave 5-6, basic towers should struggle to keep up, demonstrating proper difficulty scaling. Success is observing clear difficulty progression.

TEST_7.test_description: Test pause and restart functionality. Verify that game state is properly preserved during pause and that restart returns to the start screen correctly.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start the game, build a tower, pause with ESC, verify game freezes, unpause, let a monster reach goal to trigger game over, then press R to restart.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game should freeze all movement and attacks during pause. After unpause, gameplay should resume from exact same state. After game over, pressing R should return to start screen. Success requires all phase transitions working correctly.
TEST_7.description: Test pause and restart functionality. Verify that game state is properly preserved during pause and that restart returns to the start screen correctly.
